title: Gantt Plan vs. Reality
excerpt:
I want to be able to see in my Gantt view the planning of the project vs. the timeline in reality. 
Is there a way to do that?

posts.author: Menny (Menny Barzilay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to see in my Gantt view the planning of the project vs. the timeline in reality.
Is there a way to do that?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Menny

It sounds like you might be looking for The Gantt chart baseline!

This will help you to keep track of what your original timeline was and whether you are ahead or behind schedule.

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
